help.short: The name of the mongo cluster.

json.schema:
<prop type="array" name="allowedModes">
<prop type="array" name="previewFeatures">
<prop readOnly="True" type="array" name="privateEndpointConnections">
<prop readOnly="True" type="array" name="groupIds">

command.name: delete
command.confirmation: Are you sure you want to perform this operation?

help.short: The name of the mongo cluster.
The name of the mongo cluster.
The administrator password.
The administrator user name.
The compute tier to assign to the cluster, where each tier maps to a virtual-core and memory size. Example values: 'M30', 'M40'.
Enable or disable the Mongo Data API on the cluster. Allowed values: Enabled, Disabled. Example: --data-api-mode Enabled
The target high availability mode requested for the cluster.
The geo-location where the resource lives
Resource tags.
Number of shards to provision on the cluster.
The size of the data disk assigned to each server.
The type of storage to provision the cluster servers with.

json.schema:
<userAssigned action="create" type="array" name="userAssigned" arg="$resource.identity.userAssigned">
<prop type="array" name="allowedModes" arg="$resource.properties.authConfig.allowedModes">
<prop type="array" name="previewFeatures" arg="$resource.properties.previewFeatures">

<prop type="array" name="allowedModes">
<prop type="array" name="previewFeatures">
<prop readOnly="True" type="array" name="privateEndpointConnections">
<prop readOnly="True" type="array" name="groupIds">

help.short: The name of the mongo cluster.
The administrator password.
The administrator user name.
The compute tier to assign to the cluster, where each tier maps to a virtual-core and memory size. Example values: 'M30', 'M40'.
Enable or disable the Mongo Data API on the cluster. Allowed values: Enabled, Disabled. Example: --data-api-mode Enabled
The target high availability mode requested for the cluster.
Type of managed service identity (where both SystemAssigned and UserAssigned types are allowed).

The set of user assigned identities associated with the resource. The userAssignedIdentities dictionary keys will be ARM resource ids in the form: '/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.ManagedIdentity/userAssignedIdentities/{identityName}. The dictionary values can be empty objects ({}) in requests.
Resource tags.
Number of shards to provision on the cluster.
The size of the data disk assigned to each server.
The type of storage to provision the cluster servers with.

json.schema:
<prop type="array" name="allowedModes">
<prop type="array" name="previewFeatures">
<prop readOnly="True" type="array" name="privateEndpointConnections">
<prop readOnly="True" type="array" name="groupIds">

help.short: The name of the mongo cluster.

json.schema:
<prop type="array" name="allowedModes">
<prop type="array" name="previewFeatures">
<prop readOnly="True" type="array" name="privateEndpointConnections">
<prop readOnly="True" type="array" name="groupIds">

help.short: The name of the mongo cluster.

json.schema:
<prop type="array" name="allowedModes">
<prop type="array" name="previewFeatures">
<prop readOnly="True" type="array" name="privateEndpointConnections">
<prop readOnly="True" type="array" name="groupIds">

help.short: The name of the mongo cluster.

json.schema:
<prop type="array" name="allowedModes">
<prop type="array" name="previewFeatures">
<prop readOnly="True" type="array" name="privateEndpointConnections">
<prop readOnly="True" type="array" name="groupIds">
